title: Lockable Doors
description: A Minecraft mod that adds doors that can only be opened using a key.
body:
Creates locked door variants for almost all vanilla doors. These new lockable door can not be opened by hand and are opened by a new key item.

The key recipe is unlocked upon aquiring a gold ingot.



These doors function as an alternative to complicated redstone doors for creating a secure base. 

Recipes for the doors can be obtained by first crafting the door you would wish to make a lockable version of.

Currently available door options:

-Acacia

-Bamboo

-Birch

-Cherry

-Crimson

-Dark Oak

-Iron

-Jungle

-Mangrove

-Oak

-Spruce

-Warped
